title: Gibson Assembly - 3
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ar0k","text":"Gibson Assembly is a method for joining multiple DNA fragments in a single, isothermal reaction. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Design and Order Sequences Design primers and find a desired vector Custom Primer Ajax Finechem (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #100007350
Fabricate DNA Segments for PCR using Primers PIn2-BM3R1-PIn1-BM3R1-PB1-PhIF-PP2 Thermo Fisher pAN1201 addgene Catalog #74695 Generate DNA segments
Combine segments in equimolar concentrations On ice
Run PCR product on agarose gel
Add Gibson Assembly Master Mix Gibson Assembly Master Mix - 50 rxns New England Biolabs
Screen to ensure the correct plasmid product was used using restriction digest
